description_long: This is a military-style utility helicopter with a streamlined, olive green fuselage and a large, rounded cockpit at the front. The helicopter features a prominent main rotor with four long, black blades, each tipped with red and white markings for visibility. The tail section is elongated and tapers to a vertical stabilizer, with a smaller tail rotor mounted on the left side. The landing gear consists of two simple, sturdy skids extending beneath the fuselage, providing stable ground support. The cockpit windows are large, slightly tinted, and wrap around the front and sides, offering wide visibility for the crew. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban or tactical operations.
description: A military-style olive green helicopter with a rounded cockpit, four-blade main rotor, and sturdy landing skids. It features large, tinted cockpit windows and a side-mounted tail rotor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the helicopter, main rotor, cockpit, and landing skids.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded cockpit, wide windshield, and the symmetry of the main rotor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail rotor, main rotor, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail boom, tail rotor, and the alignment of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with red and white tips for visibility. The blades are evenly spaced and extend well beyond the width of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_rotor: A two-blade tail rotor mounted vertically on the left side of the tail boom, colored gray with red and white tips, and no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular landing skids made of metal, colored gray, with simple crossbars for structural support and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three large, slightly tinted cockpit windows wrap around the front and sides, with rounded edges and black framing, providing wide visibility.
